title: astragalus iliensis
intro: Astragalus iliensis is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the Tian Shan mountain range in western China. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus iliensis include reducing the severity of colds and flu, improving immune function, and enhancing overall physical fitness. Astragalus iliensis is typically prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
